summary: Script has solid Bash practices (set -euo pipefail, error handling, validation, proper exit codes), but deliverable critically incomplete: (1) No bats-core tests provided—task required TDD-first testing methodology; (2) Workflow references fixtures/mixed.json which doesn't exist, making workflow non-executable; (3) Missing shellcheck validation step (required); (4) No act-result.txt artifact (explicitly required); (5) CONFIG_FILE env var (workflow ~line 19) has meaningless conditional returning same value both branches; (6) apt-get errors silenced by ||. Script alone is maintainable, but missing test infrastructure and fixtures violates core task requirements.
